summary: iter236 testing completed - 13/13 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. New endpoints (orders/place, inventory/audit-batch, team-chat/rooms) working correctly. UI features (splash morph, inventory audit mode, dual-button orders, P&L line click, group chat, voice panel with CognitiveMindCanvas) all functional.
seed_data_creation: Test rooms and audit entries created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter236 adds: (1) POST /api/ecw-ops/orders/place for quick PO creation, (2) POST /api/ecw-ops/inventory/audit-batch + GET /api/ecw-ops/inventory/audit/{id} for offline voice audit, (3) POST /api/team-chat/rooms, POST /api/team-chat/rooms/{id}/send, GET /api/team-chat/rooms/{id}/messages for group chat. Frontend: splash morph (1100ms cubic-bezier), inventory audit mode with 5 locations, dual-button order guide footer, P&L line click opens filtered invoice modal, group chat with room creation and messaging, CognitiveMindCanvas with breathing/eyes/TTS ripple.

backend.POST /api/ecw-ops/orders/place: PASS - Creates PO with status='ordered', source='mobile-quick', calculates total correctly
backend.POST /api/ecw-ops/inventory/audit-batch: PASS - Creates audit entries, auto-generates audit_id if not provided
backend.GET /api/ecw-ops/inventory/audit/{id}: PASS - Returns audit with entries and count
backend.POST /api/team-chat/rooms: PASS - Creates room with id, name, members
backend.POST /api/team-chat/rooms/{id}/send: PASS - Sends message, updates last_message on room
backend.GET /api/team-chat/rooms/{id}/messages: PASS - Returns messages in chronological order

frontend.Splash morph fade: PASS - 1100ms transition with cubic-bezier, scale, blur, saturate
frontend.Inventory audit button: PASS - inventory-audit-btn visible on Inventory tab
frontend.Audit location picker: PASS - Shows 5+ location buttons including walk-in-1
frontend.Audit mode controls: PASS - Hold to count, Next row, Next shelf, Sync now buttons present
frontend.Orders dual-button footer: PASS - Both 'Request' and 'Place order now' buttons visible when items in basket
frontend.P&L line click: PASS - Clicking line item opens invoice modal with filtered title (e.g., 'Invoices · Other Beverage Revenue')
frontend.Group chat room list: PASS - Shows existing rooms with last_message
frontend.Voice panel CognitiveMindCanvas: PASS - Canvas renders with breathing particles, eyes visible
frontend.Voice panel mic button: PASS - echo-voice-mic button present and functional
frontend.Department buttons: PASS - All 4 departments (culinary, foh, mixology-rd, pastry) switch H1 correctly
